km.MIDDLESEX, ENGLAND: loនដុន, ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស, uណៃteត គីnហ្គដុម

zh.lifeSummary: Mrs Jordan Briset於大約1181年出生在英國英格蘭倫敦。她和Jordan Briset至少有1個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs Jordan Briset于大约1181年出生在英国英格兰倫敦。她和Jordan Briset至少有1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Jordan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a name given to a child of either sex baptized in holy water that was, purportedly at least, brought from the River Jordan, whose Hebrew name, ha-yarden, means ‘flowing down’. It was in this river that Christ was baptized by John the Baptist, and medieval pilgrims to the Holy Land usually tried to bring back a flask of its water with them. The modern given name is either a revival of this, or else a transferred use of the surname that was derived from the medieval given name. It is more popular as a boy's name in Britain and as a girl's name in the United States.

en.lifeSummary: Mrs Jordan Briset was born about 1181, in London, England, United Kingdom. She had at least 1 daughter with Jordan Briset.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs Jordan Briset est née environ 1181, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Jordan Briset.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs Jordan Briset wurde um 1181 in London, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hatte mit Jordan Briset mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs Jordan Briset è nata il circa 1181 nel London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Jordan Briset.

ja.MIDDLESEX, ENGLAND: イギリスイギリスロンドン
ja.lifeSummary: Mrs Jordan Brisetは約1181年にイギリスイギリスロンドンで生まれた。彼女はJordan Brisetとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs Jordan Briset(은)는 대략 1181년 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Jordan Briset(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs Jordan Briset nasceu aproximadamente 1181, em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Jordan Briset.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs Jordan Briset родилась около 1181 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Jordan Briset.

es.lifeSummary: Mrs Jordan Briset nació aproximadamente 1181, en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Jordan Briset.
